collectors.title: Database
collectors.titleDetails: (8 total Queries, 8 of them unique across 1 Connection)

queries.sql: SELECT regimes.*, (SELECT IFNULL(SUM(p.calories) / NULLIF(COUNT(DISTINCT rd.jour_numero), 0), 0) FROM regime_details rd JOIN plats p ON p.id = rd.plat_id WHERE rd.regime_id = regimes.id) AS calories_moyennes, (SELECT IFNULL(SUM(a.calories_brules_heure * (ra.duree_minutes_jour / 60)), 0) FROM regime_activites ra JOIN activites_sportives a ON a.id = ra.activite_id WHERE ra.regime_id = regimes.id) AS depense_sport, ((SELECT IFNULL(SUM(p.calories) / NULLIF(COUNT(DISTINCT rd.jour_numero), 0), 0) FROM regime_details rd JOIN plats p ON p.id = rd.plat_id WHERE rd.regime_id = regimes.id) - 1971 - (SELECT IFNULL(SUM(a.calories_brules_heure * (ra.duree_minutes_jour / 60)), 0) FROM regime_activites ra JOIN activites_sportives a ON a.id = ra.activite_id WHERE ra.regime_id = regimes.id)) AS balance FROM `regimes` WHERE `regimes`.`objectif_type_id` = 1 HAVING balance > 0

timelineData.name: Query
timelineData.query: SELECT regimes.*, (SELECT IFNULL(SUM(p.calories) / NULLIF(COUNT(DISTINCT rd.jour_numero), 0), 0) FROM regime_details rd JOIN plats p ON p.id = rd.plat_id WHERE rd.regime_id = regimes.id) AS calories_moyennes, (SELECT IFNULL(SUM(a.calories_brules_heure * (ra.duree_minutes_jour / 60)), 0) FROM regime_activites ra JOIN activites_sportives a ON a.id = ra.activite_id WHERE ra.regime_id = regimes.id) AS depense_sport, ((SELECT IFNULL(SUM(p.calories) / NULLIF(COUNT(DISTINCT rd.jour_numero), 0), 0) FROM regime_details rd JOIN plats p ON p.id = rd.plat_id WHERE rd.regime_id = regimes.id) - 1971 - (SELECT IFNULL(SUM(a.calories_brules_heure * (ra.duree_minutes_jour / 60)), 0) FROM regime_activites ra JOIN activites_sportives a ON a.id = ra.activite_id WHERE ra.regime_id = regimes.id)) AS balance FROM `regimes` WHERE `regimes`.`objectif_type_id` = 1 HAVING balance > 0
